title: OpenODC Document Schema
description: JSON Schema for OpenODC documents. Aligned with GB/T 45312-2025 «Intelligent and connected vehicles — Operational design condition for automated driving system».

id.description: Unique slug identifier, lowercase, hyphenated. e.g. byd-han-2026-dipilot-highway

spec_version.description: OpenODC schema version this document conforms to.

vendor.description: Vendor name in Chinese, e.g. 比亚迪

vendor_en.description: Vendor name in English, e.g. BYD

model.description: Vehicle model designation, e.g. 汉 EV 2026 款

function_name.description: ADS function name, e.g. DiPilot Highway, NGP, Autopilot

ads_level.description: ADS automation level per GB/T 40429-2021 (SAE J3016 equivalent).

software_version.description: Software/firmware version this ODC declaration applies to.

hardware_config.description: Hardware configuration this ODC declaration applies to.

effective_date.description: ISO 8601 date when this ODC declaration takes effect.

elements.description: List of ODC elements as defined per GB/T 45312-2025.

submitted_by.description: GitHub username or vendor account that submitted this record.

review_status.description: draft = unreviewed; community_reviewed = peer reviewed via PR; vendor_confirmed = officially endorsed by the vendor.

sources.description: URLs or document references that back the data in this record.

element_id.description: Element id from the schema/categories/*.json registry. e.g. odd.road.type.highway.expressway

requirement.description: Per clause 5.4.b: 允许=permitted, 不允许=not_permitted.

description.description: Free-form description of the requirement. Equivalent to the «元素要求» column in the standard's example tables.

parameter_range.description: Quantitative limits, e.g. '曲率半径 ≥ 150 m', '速度 0–120 km/h'.

exit_behavior.description: Per clause 5.5: when requirement is not_permitted, must specify whether the element will suppress activation, trigger exit, or both.

source.description: Provenance metadata for this specific element entry.

primary_id.description: The 'primary' element (主 ODC 元素) per clause 5.4.c.

dependent_id.description: The 'dependent' element (从 ODC 元素) per clause 5.4.c.
